accreditations.title: NAAC A+ Accredited
accreditations.description: Accredited with NAAC A+ in 2022 after maintaining NAAC A grade since 2015, with the highest grade score in the region.

accreditations.title: AICTE Approval
accreditations.description: Approved by AICTE, Graphic Era ensures academic excellence across all technical courses. UGC recognized with Regularized Status by the Ministry of Education.

accreditations.title: UGC Recognition
accreditations.description: Approved by UGC and accorded the Regularized Status by the Ministry of Education, Government of India.

accreditations.title: NIRF Ranked
accreditations.description: Ranked 48 amongst top universities of India by NIRF 2025, consistently improving year over year.

accreditations.title: NBA Accreditation
accreditations.description: Multiple programs accredited by NBA, ensuring quality education and international recognition.

accreditations.title: QS Ranked
accreditations.description: Featured in QS World University Rankings and QS Asia University Rankings for consistent quality.
